overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dense forest at night. The character traverses a shallow stream, passes ancient stone ruins, and approaches a pastoral clearing with grazing cattle under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail approaching stream crossing

events.description: approaching and entering shallow stream crossing the forest path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through dark forest toward a shallow creek, sword glowing faintly on his back

entered.detail: dense evergreen pine trees forming dark forest wall
dense evergreen pine trees forming dark forest wall
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
small creek with clear water flowing across the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with tall pine trees flanking both sides. Geralt walks forward along the dirt path, approaching a shallow stream that cuts across the trail. The environment is dense and enclosed, with limited sky visibility through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with ancient stone ruins

events.description: exiting stream and entering area with stone wall ruins on left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along forest path beside crumbling stone wall ruins

entered.detail: ancient crumbling stone wall running parallel to the path
weathered wooden posts marking boundary on right side

segments.scene_description: After crossing the stream, the path continues alongside ancient stone ruins on the left. The forest remains dense with tall pines, and wooden fence posts appear sporadically on the right. The ground is firm dirt trail as Geralt maintains a steady walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail with scattered boulders

events.description: ground surface changes from dirt to rocky gravel with boulders

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on uneven rocky terrain with scattered stones

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside with scattered boulders and sparse vegetation
large rocks and stones littering the path

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes rocky and uneven as it ascends a hillside. The stone wall disappears, replaced by a steep rocky slope on the right with scattered boulders. The path is now gravel and stone rather than dirt, and the vegetation becomes sparser on the right side.

events.description: grazing cattle become visible in the open pasture ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching open pasture with grazing animals visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: grazing cattle standing and feeding in the pasture ahead

entered.detail: wooden fence line marking the pasture boundary
domestic cows grazing in the open field beyond the fence
grassy clearing with open sky visible above

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a pastoral scene with a wooden fence on the right and grazing cattle in the distance. The rocky terrain gives way to grassy pasture land. The sky becomes fully visible as the tree canopy recedes, and Geralt continues toward the animals in the clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, enclosed forest that gradually opens into a wide, starry pastoral clearing. It begins on a dark dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees, moving forward as Geralt crosses a shallow stream that cuts across the path. As the camera continues, the scene shifts to follow the trail alongside ancient stone ruins and sporadic wooden fence posts before the ground turns rocky and uneven during an ascent up a hillside. The terrain then transitions from gravel and boulders to soft grassy pasture as the tree canopy recedes, revealing a wide-open sky. Finally, the forest opens completely to reveal a peaceful scene with a wooden fence and grazing cattle in the distance.
